SAFETY
INFORMATION
• SINGAPORE AIRLINES
TAKE OFF &
LANDING
Bags that cannot fit into overhead compartments or under seats
will be stowed in the cargo hold. Please remove spare lithium
batteries and valuables from these bags.
DO NOT REMOVE THIS CARD FROM AIRCRAFT
It is a chargeable offence not to obey safety instructions
from our crew, or to remove or tamper with the safety
equipment on board the aircraft.
B777-300ER

TOILET

ALARM
DURING TURBULENCE
Remain in your seats with seatbelts fastened, even when in bed mode.
Remove infants from bassinets and secure with infant seatbelts.
Toilets must not be used

Take-off

Taxi-in
PORTABLE ELECTRONIC DEVICES (PEDs)
USAGE
• The use of large PEDs (such as laptops and notebooks) and DVD
players is not permitted during taxi (for departure & arrival), take-off
and landing, and they must be stowed.
• The use of low power consumption PEDs such as heart pacemaker,
hearing aids and digital watches is permitted for all phases of flight.
• Please refer to the information below on the usage
of lightweight PEDs such as mobile phones and
tablet. They must not be connected to peripheral
devices (such as keyboards, earphones etc.), in-seat
power supply outlets or the USB/HDMI ports of
the Inflight Entertainment System during taxi (for
departure & arrival), take-off and landing.
• Voice communications using transmitting PEDs is prohibited at all
• Charging is only permitted during cruise and for PEDs equipped with
original manufacturer's equipment (OEM) batteries. Use the in-seat
power supply or USB port to charge PEDs. Do not cover PEDs with
a blanket or pillow or place them inside the seat pocket. Do not
leave PEDs unattended while charging.
